title: malcolmia exacoides
intro: Malcolmia exacoides, also known as Woad or Garden Woad, is a biennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Malcolmia exacoides include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues. Herbal preparations of Malcolmia exacoides include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
